feedback: Average value for money. Plans sit in line with market norms.
ngl the roaming packs are confusing. so many options and none clearly explain what happens after the pack data is exhausted. got charged 800 rupees extra on my trip because of this unclear policy
Roaming is adequate for most popular travel destinations. Standard.
Mobile app experience is average. Nothing special or broken.

How convenient that the data balance notification arrives exactly one minute after my data is fully exhausted. Timely alerts are clearly not in their vocabulary. The mobile app shows remaining balance but refreshes once every 6 hours which is essentially useless for real-time tracking.
Billing fine. Customer support and app also work normally.

Customer support via WhatsApp is surprisingly efficient. Much better than calling their helpline. I got my data balance discrepancy resolved through a quick chat conversation without any hold time or IVR navigation. This should be their primary support channel.
OTT content variety in the premium plan is adequate. Covers major apps.
No signal indoors. Call quality and internet both unusable here.

My family of four uses the shared plan which includes separate OTT profiles for each member. The value for money is remarkable because individually these subscriptions would cost us triple. Data allocation is generous and the billing is consolidated and clear.
Standard OTT bundle. Works as advertised nothing more.
v bad value for money on the basic plans. no ott bundle no decent data. only premium plans above 499 get anything worthwhile. feels like they dont care about budget custmers at all
custmer care helped me find the best value plan with all the ott apps i wanted. she compared three options and explained which one gave the most for my budget. appreciated the honest recommendation
ngl the network coverage is surprisingly good in my village. didnt expect it from this carrier. call quality is also clear. pleasantly surprised for once
Roaming pack pricing is average. Neither cheap nor expensive.
tbh the mobile app is just okay. nothing groundbreaking compared to what other carriers offer. does the basics fine but the UI feels dated and slow on my phone
Terrible value for money. Paying top price for bottom service.
Customer support is unreachable during weekends. Very inconvenient.
prblm with data balance again. reacharged 2gb plan but only showing 1.5gb. this happens every single time. their system is clearly eating data somewhere. nobody at custmer care believes me

The value for money on budget plans is terrible. You get barely 1GB daily data with pathetic internet speed for a price that other carriers use to offer 2GB with much better speeds. The only reason I stay is because of network coverage in my remote area.

5G experience is just okay after using it for a couple of months now. It is not the revolution they promised in their advertising campaigns. Speeds are marginally better than 4G in my area and the coverage is still patchy. I expected a much bigger leap in performance based on all the marketing and premium pricing.
Good data balance management through the app. Easy to monitor.
plz improve ur custmer support. waited 30 mins on call and still no resolution. very frustrating experience every single time
v bad experience overall. sim activation took a week, network coverage in my building is zero, and the reacharg plan i chose gives terrible value. considering switching to competitor immediately
Standard fare. Nothing remarkable.
omg worst value for money ever. paying 499 monthly and the ott bundle only includes mobile-only plans that u cant watch on tv. what a joke
Support staff is polite but slow in resolving actual issues.

The roaming experience was mixed on my last trip. Connectivity in major cities was fine with decent speeds but the moment I moved to rural areas abroad the network dropped completely. For the premium price of the international pack I expected consistent coverage regardless of location.
Good enough for calls I suppose. Nothing more nothing less.
Data balance is always inaccurate. Cannot trust the numbers shown.

Sure, the call quality is amazing if you enjoy hearing every third word of a conversation. Really makes you appreciate the art of guessing what the other person said. Premium experience for premium pricing.
Support team was okay. Got the job done eventually.

Genuinely pleased with the overall experience after switching carriers. Network coverage is strong in all the areas I frequent, call quality is crystal clear, and the pricing feels fair for what I receive. Would happily recommend to friends and family.

The pricing on the family plan is competitive and includes OTT access for all four members. Each person gets their own data balance and the billing is consolidated into one clear monthly statement. Network coverage works well across the different areas where my family lives.
The 5G experience in my city has been phenomenal. I consistently get speeds above 800 Mbps and streaming is buttery smooth. Definitely worth upgrading my plan for this kind of performance.
Professional customer support team. Standard interaction overall.
Fine.

The value for money analysis clearly favors the 84-day plans over monthly ones. When you break it down per day the longer validity plans include better OTT bundles and more daily data at a lower effective cost. I always advise friends to go for quarterly minimum.

The mobile app payment processing is unreliable and has failed me multiple times at critical moments. Twice this month a recharge transaction showed as failed in the app but the money was debited from my bank account. Getting refunds through customer support took over a week each time with multiple follow-ups needed.
Recharge plans could offer more data for the price charged.

The app widget shows my remaining data balance and validity at a glance without opening the full app. This small feature saves me time daily and I appreciate the thoughtful design. The overall mobile app experience is among the best I have seen from any Indian carrier.

The mobile app experience has been excellent since the recent update. The interface is clean and intuitive and I can manage everything from recharges to plan changes without any issues. Loading times are minimal and the data balance widget on the home screen is particularly useful.
Impressed with internet speed after switching carriers. Much faster now.

The data validity on the 365-day plan is excellent value. I do not have to worry about monthly recharges and the internet speed remains consistent throughout the year. The convenience factor alone makes this plan worth recommending to everyone in my family.
reacharg failed and custmer support took 3 days to credit back my money. meanwhile i had no data balance for 3 days. this is unacceptable for a paid service. they should have emergency credits
prblm with the mobile app since last update. keeps logging me out and the reacharg page doesnt load. had to use website instead which is also slow

The recharge plan comparison feature in the app is helpful for identifying the best value option. I can filter by OTT bundles included and sort by price per day. This kind of tool empowers customers to make informed choices rather than defaulting to whatever is promoted.
Call quality, network coverage, and billing all working perfectly.

The 5G trial period was fine. Average speeds around 300-400 Mbps which is acceptable but not groundbreaking. Call quality on VoLTE remained unaffected which is good. Will continue with the plan for now.
Roaming is fine. Standard connectivity in popular destinations.
reacharg kiya but data balance not updated. been 2 hours still showing old balance. prblm every single time i recharge. so frustrating
Overpriced plans. Not competitive at all anymore.

I am writing to acknowledge the outstanding support I received from the technical team regarding persistent 5G connectivity issues in my locality. After the initial complaint they sent a field engineer within 48 hours who identified a tower configuration error. The fix was deployed that same week and my speeds have been perfect since.
Impressed with the 5G trial. Speed test showed 1.2 Gbps download.
Billing cycle aligns with my salary date. Convenient timing.
plz check my data balance. i reacharged 2gb plan but app shows only 500mb remaining after one day. this is not correct plz fix

Customer support resolved my billing issue within 10 minutes of connecting. The agent was knowledgeable and polite and did not transfer me to multiple departments like other carriers do. Really impressed with the efficiency and professionalism of the entire interaction.
SIM activation process is straightforward. No hassles encountered.

Impressed with how quickly customer support handles requests through the app chat. My call quality issue was acknowledged and escalated within two minutes of me describing it. Got a resolution callback within the hour. Far better than the phone support experience.
ur data balance system is broken. charged me for data i didnt use. want refund asap
ur roaming pack didnt activate even though i paid for it through the app. no data no calls nothing worked abroad. had to buy local sim. total waste of money
Decent value for money. Plans are reasonably competitive in the market.
omg the data validity on this plan is a joke. 14 days for that amount of data?? who finishes 50gb in 14 days unless ur streaming all day. give us proper validity periods
SIM activation happened within the expected time. Normal process.
tbh the data validity on this plan is decent enough for what i pay. internet speed is ok too. nothing amazing but it works for daily stuff

The mobile app crashes every time I try to check my data balance. Meanwhile call quality has gone downhill since I moved to this area. The app needs a serious overhaul and so does the tower infrastructure here.

The quarterly recharge plan at 699 is solid value for money with 84 days validity and 2GB daily data. OTT access includes three platforms and the billing is straightforward with no hidden charges. Data balance tracking in the app is accurate. Reliable overall.

Happy with the internet speed on my plan. Streaming works without buffering and online gaming has low ping. Data balance depletes at a reasonable rate that matches my actual consumption. Would recommend this plan to moderate users.

Good customer care available through multiple touchpoints. The WhatsApp support channel is particularly effective for quick queries. I appreciate that they offer self-service for routine tasks and human agents for complex problems. Well designed support ecosystem.

custmer care is absolutely hopeless for resolving technical issues. called about my 5g not working despite being in a covered area and the agent told me to restart my phone. when that didnt work she said buy a new phone. my phone supports 5g and works fine on other networks. clearly a provisioning prblm they refuse to fix

Internet speed is superb on 5G in my area. The data validity of 56 days and generous daily limits make this the ideal plan for heavy users. Call quality is also crystal clear which is a bonus I was not expecting from a data-focused plan.

Wonderful 5G experience. If by 5G they mean five minutes to load Google. The marketing promised next-gen speeds but what I actually get is last-gen frustration. At least the billing is accurate so I know exactly how much I overpay each month.
prblm with intrenet speed and data balance both. speed is pathetic and data finishes in 2 days even though i barely watch videos. custmer care was useless too
omg worst data validity ever. 14 days plan expired before i could even use half the data. what a scam. never buying this plan again
Switched to this carrier for 5G and I am not disappointed. Calls are clear and the internet speed during peak hours is still fantastic. Best decision I made this year for my mobile experience.
Hm. Average.
SIM activation timeline is reasonable. No strong opinions.
Signal is present in the city center. Nothing remarkable.
Mobile app is functional. Does the basic job without issues.

v bad experience with the reacharg plans lately. they keep reducing data allocation while maintaining the same price. my 299 plan used to give 2gb daily now its only 1.5gb. data validity also shortened from 28 to 24 days. how is this acceptable. zero value for money anymore

Happy with the current recharge plan benefits. Good data allocation and fair pricing for the market segment I fall into. Billing is always on time and the app sends reminders before validity expires which helps me plan my recharge ahead.

Internet speed is super fast on this new plan. Very satisfied with the upgrade decision. Streaming and gaming both work flawlessly. The data validity of 56 days is generous enough and my data balance lasts comfortably through the cycle.

The sim activation for my elderly mother went smoothly thanks to patient customer support staff at the store. They helped with the video KYC process and made sure the recharge plan suited her light usage needs. She was making calls within an hour of visiting.

ur reacharg plans keep getting more expensive every quarter. same plan that was 199 is now 249. no improvement in service just higher pricing. where is the value

The OTT bundle with my recharge plan is amazing. I get Netflix, Prime, and Disney Plus all included in my 599 plan which would otherwise cost me over 1000 rupees separately. The value for money on this combination is unbeatable in the current market.

The data validity period is reasonable for the price point. Internet speeds are consistently good throughout my billing cycle. I appreciate that there is no artificial throttling before the validity expires which is something my previous provider used to do.
omg worst call quality today. cant hear anything properly.
I have opinions. They are neutral.
cant blv they reduced the data validity from 28 to 24 days without even informing customers. same price less validity. how is this acceptable. total disrespect to loyal users

Network coverage throughout my apartment complex is acceptable but not outstanding. It works on most floors without issues but the signal gets weak in the parking basement and some corners of the gym area. For everyday usage like calls and messaging it is fine. Would appreciate stronger indoor coverage though.
OTT bundle works. Access to streaming platforms is functional.
omg worst internet speed ever. buffering on every single video. how is this even a 4G connection

The OTT bundle integration with the carrier app needs work. Half the time clicking on a streaming service from within the app opens a blank page or throws an error. When it works it is great but the reliability is not where it should be for a core feature.
The billing is transparent and the network coverage has been great since I joined. Call quality is consistently good across different locations in my city. Really appreciate the honest service.
Roaming worked in Singapore. Standard connectivity nothing special.

I activated a new SIM for my mother through the app and the entire process was smooth from start to finish. Document upload worked on first try, video KYC was completed in under three minutes, and the SIM was active by the same evening. Impressive turnaround.
Functional.

Network coverage is satisfactory in my daily use areas. I do not have major complaints but I also would not say it exceeds expectations. SIM activation is a standard process. Nothing to report good or bad.
Recharge plan with OTT is good value. Renewed happily this quarter.

Love the OTT bundle. Netflix included with my plan saves me money every month. The streaming quality is consistently good thanks to the fast internet speed on this network. My family uses it daily for movies and shows and we have never faced any buffering issues.

The value for money on the annual plan is unbeatable when you consider the included OTT subscriptions, generous data allocation, and extended validity period. I calculated the per-day cost and it works out to under 8 rupees for everything I need. Billing is always transparent too.

tbh the overall experience is mixed. internet speed and 5g are great in the city but network coverage falls apart in suburbs. billing is always correct which is good. value for money depends heavily on where you live
OTT bundle with Netflix and Prime is great value addition.

I appreciate that their customer support is available 24/7 unlike some carriers that close at 10 PM. Had a network issue at midnight during an important work deadline and the agent helped me troubleshoot and escalate it right then. The internet speed was restored within an hour.
5G in the business district is average. Works for basic tasks.

I switched specifically for the OTT bundle and I have not been disappointed. The streaming quality is excellent because the internet speed on this plan supports 4K content effortlessly. Previously I was paying separately for each service so this consolidation makes perfect financial sense.
Recharge plan benefits are average for what I pay monthly. Standard deal.
Billing accurate, recharge process smooth, and pricing transparent.
The pricing makes me laugh. Not in a good way.

The internet speed on this carrier has been embarrassingly slow for the entire quarter in my locality. The recharge plan is so generous that I get a whole 1GB of data for an entire day. In 2024. How delightfully retro of them. Meanwhile every other carrier offers 2GB minimum at lower prices but sure let me stay here for the nostalgia factor.

The mobile app keeps sending spam notifications about offers I have no interest in. There is no way to disable promotional alerts without also turning off important service notifications. This is poor UX design and makes me want to uninstall the app entirely.

I've been using this network for over a year now and the call quality in my neighborhood has always been excellent. Never experienced a dropped call or static noise. The network coverage extends well into the basement parking area too which is rare.

Really impressed with how quickly the SIM got activated. I submitted documents through the app at noon and by evening I was on the network making calls. The whole process was digital and effortless. Great first impression of the carrier.

OTT access keeps logging me out. Very annoying bug in the system.

Great customer support for premium plan users. I get priority queue access which means almost zero wait time. The agents assigned to premium accounts are clearly more experienced and handle complex issues like roaming setup and plan modifications without any fumbling.
Coverage is poor for my daily needs. Calls drop frequently even indoors.
Switched from competitor. Coverage here is about the same honestly.
Internet speed fluctuates a lot. Sometimes fast sometimes crawling.
Recharge plan variety is adequate. Usual options for every budget.
Recharge plan prices are steep. Needs revision downward.
tbh the customer support is middling. sometimes great sometimes terrible. depends entirely on which agent picks up ur call. no consistency in quality

Excellent SIM activation experience through the store. Staff was helpful and the entire process from document verification to activation was completed in under thirty minutes while I waited. They even helped me transfer contacts from my old SIM. Outstanding service.
Standard billing. Nothing notable in either direction.

Network coverage is okay across most areas I travel to for work. The data validity options available now are much better than what they offered a year ago. More flexibility in choosing between weekly, monthly, and quarterly plans. Internet speed remains consistent regardless of which validity tier you pick which is reassuring.
Customer support interactions are neither good nor bad lately.

I have been using this carrier for six months and the experience has been consistently average across all touchpoints. Network coverage is present in my routine areas, internet speed is adequate, the app functions normally, and billing processes correctly. Standard carrier experience.

After activating my new SIM the internet speed was immediately impressive on 5G. I ran speed tests showing 800 Mbps consistently. The mobile app made the entire activation process smooth and the network coverage in my building is full bars on every floor.

intrenet speed is ok i guess. not great not terrible. data balance seems accurate which is good at least

The eSIM activation combined with instant 5G connectivity made switching to this carrier the best tech decision of the year. Everything was set up through the mobile app in under 15 minutes. Network coverage at home and office is perfect and call quality is crisp.

tbh ok recharge plans. the ott bundle is a nice touch but nothing that makes me feel like im getting an incredible deal. its standard for the industry now so not really a differentiator anymore

The pricing on the 5G premium plan is justified by the actual speeds and coverage I receive in my metro area. Unlike competitors who charge similar rates but deliver inconsistent 5G, this carrier maintains reliable high-speed connectivity throughout my daily routine. The included OTT bundle adds genuine extra value.
Mediocre customer support. Room for improvement certainly exists.
Data balance is normal. No unexpected deductions noticed.

The pricing on data add-on packs is reasonable and the billing process for purchasing them through the app is seamless. I often buy the 98 rupee 6GB addon when I need extra data and it gets activated instantly with clear balance reflection.

The SIM activation for my new secondary number was completed in under four hours from online order to active connection. The app provided clear progress tracking, the video KYC process was smooth, and I received a confirmation the moment my number went live. Efficient and modern digital onboarding process.

The mobile app experience is smooth for managing recharges and tracking data balance. I can also monitor my billing history and compare recharge plans easily. However the OTT bundle section is confusing and the activation links often lead to error pages.
Customer support is poor. Agents lack basic product knowledge.

The roaming charges hit me unexpectedly because the app did not clearly show what was included in my pack versus what would be charged extra. I ended up using data thinking it was covered but got billed separately. The mobile app needs much better transparency for roaming details.

I'm on the 5G plan and honestly it has been a mixed bag. Some days the speed is incredible and other days it reverts to 4G without warning. The coverage map needs to be more accurate. At least call quality hasn't suffered.

I purchased the 2GB daily plan expecting good internet speed but the actual throughput is barely enough for streaming in 480p. The data balance tracking in the app seems inaccurate too as it shows more consumption than what my phone reports. Double disappointment.

The recharge plan structure is confusing with too many tiers that differ only slightly in OTT access and data limits. They should simplify to three or four clear options. Currently it takes research to figure out which plan gives the best value for money.
Call quality keeps breaking up during important conversations daily.

I am extremely frustrated with customer support. My billing shows charges for a plan I explicitly cancelled two months ago. Three calls and two complaint tickets later nobody has bothered to fix it or reverse the charges. This feels like deliberate theft at this point.
Good internet speed. Downloads are fast enough for my needs.
Internet speed is average. Not fast not slow.
tbh ok roaming experience. worked in some countries but not others. coverage was patchy in southeast asia but fine in middle east

cant blv how long sim activation takes with this carrier. been waiting 3 days and still showing inactive. other providers do it in 2 hours. v bad process

The value for money calculation clearly favors this carrier when you include the OTT bundle worth. I was paying 199 for Netflix, 179 for Prime, and 299 for Hotstar separately. Now all three are included in my 799 recharge plan along with 3GB daily data. The math speaks for itself.
Billing is standard. No issues but nothing remarkable either.
Wonderful call clarity on this network. Best I've used in years. The 5G has also made a noticeable difference in how fast web pages load and apps update. Money well spent on the upgrade.
Worst call quality ever. Been with this network 3 years and it is getting worse not better.

Customer support is there but nothing about the experience stands out. They process requests at a normal pace and provide standard answers. Not particularly warm or cold just professional and functional which I suppose is adequate for a telecom carrier.

Call quality is mediocre at best on this network. It is neither impressively good nor terribly bad. The OTT bundle with the 5G plan is a great value add. Netflix and Prime included with excellent streaming quality thanks to the fast network. Only concern is the data validity period could be longer for the price.

Customer support fixed my internet speed issue overnight. Very responsive team that clearly takes technical complaints seriously. The follow-up call the next morning to confirm the resolution was a nice professional touch that I have not experienced with other carriers.
Data validity and balance both seem fine to me. Standard experience.
Roaming works but the speeds are quite slow compared to domestic.

The call quality during this monsoon season has been remarkably reliable compared to previous years. No crackling noise, no disconnections, and consistent ability to place outgoing calls regardless of weather. Phenomenal how they managed to make the SIM activation process feel like applying for a home loan. Seven documents, two store visits, one video KYC that failed thrice, and four days of waiting. All for the privilege of becoming their customer. Truly exclusive onboarding.

Internet speed has been consistently excellent for the past few months. I work from home and rely heavily on stable high-speed connectivity for video calls and large file uploads. This network delivers exactly what was promised in my plan without any throttling during peak hours.

Data validity is acceptable for the monthly plan. Standard offering.
intrenet speed in the app keeps showing wrong readings. actual speed test gives 50mbps but app shows 10mbps. confusing and unreliable speed test feature

Very fast internet speed on the premium plan. Worth the extra cost. I consistently get download speeds above 200 Mbps on 4G itself and the data validity of 84 days means I am not pressured to consume everything quickly. Great overall package.

Genuinely happy with the internet speed improvements in my area this quarter. 5G finally works consistently and the speeds support everything from 4K streaming to large uploads without any hiccups. The recharge plan is fairly priced for the level of service delivered.
